---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tweak or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of what you want to improve.

**Proposed solution**
How would this feature work?

**For tweak requests — include:**
- Registry path or Windows component affected
- Evidence of measurable impact (benchmark, documentation link)
- Rollback procedure

**Additional context**
Any screenshots, documentation or references.
